title: Review: /balance /receive /payments; send_payment wired
notes:
Maintainer risk: MEDIUM — two user-facing correctness issues (wrong /receive warning, frozen TxRecord block_height) that will generate issue reports; one reliability gap (endpoint failover bypass) that silently fails under poor network conditions.
Confidence: 85% chance of no missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: happy_path test is params-gated (skips without sapling params), so the broadcast→mark-spent→insert-tx path has no always-running test. Would raise confidence if: (1) params are present in CI so happy_path always runs, or (2) the DB post-broadcast steps are extracted and tested independently with a mock.
